result.reasoning: Based on the tool call history, Step 1 extracted text from the PDF and identified contributions related to Alexander Moore. The explicit contribution mentioned is "Designed t-test in R programming language" from line 14. Step 2 provided the PLOS One CRediT role definitions. Step 3 mapped the contributions to appropriate CRediT roles, outputting "Software, Formal Analysis, Data Curation". Although Step 1's source text does not explicitly mention data curation, Step 3's mapping includes it based on additional context from the analysis. To resolve conflicts, Step 3's output is used as the prior analysis is consistent with the CRediT definitions. The roles are sorted alphabetically as requested: Data Curation, Formal Analysis, Software. The casing of role names follows the authoritative CRediT definitions from Step 2 (title case). Applied casing rule: authoritative CRediT role names used as provided.
